name: Apple Cranberry Cookie Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 4 Granny Smith Apples, peeled, cored, sliced
1 can (16 oz) whole berry cranberry sauce
1 package (20 oz) refrigerated sugar cookie dough, cut into 1/4-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Peel, core, and slice apples. Place the sliced apples in a deep dish baker.
3. In a bowl, combine cranberry sauce, brown sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Mix well.
4. Pour the cranberry mixture over the apples.
5. Cut the reserved cookie dough into 1/4-inch thick slices and arrange evenly over the apple mixture.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the apples are tender and the top is golden brown.
Yield: 10 servings.
